  1. Home
  2. Editorial Policy

Editorial Policy

How we research, verify and maintain our content.

We want our tennis content to be accurate, clear and genuinely useful. This policy explains how we work.

Sourcing

We base factual content on official and primary sources where possible — including tournament organisers, the Lawn Tennis Association of Malaysia (LTAM), the ITF, and the ATP and WTA. Tournament data such as our 2026 calendar is taken from official summaries.

Verification and no fabrication

We do not publish invented results, statistics or champions. When a detail (such as a past finalist or score) cannot be confirmed against a reliable source, we leave it clearly marked as unconfirmed rather than filling the gap with a guess.

Updates

Schedules and results change. We review time-sensitive pages — particularly events and calendars — and show a "last updated" date on each page so you can judge how current it is.

Corrections

If you spot an error, please contact us. We correct confirmed mistakes promptly and, where relevant, note the change.

Commercial content

This site may add commercial content in future. When it does, it will be clearly labelled and kept separate from editorial coverage. See our responsible gambling page for our position on any future betting-related content.

Last updated: 18 June 2026

Malaysian Open Tennis

Tournaments, records and resources for Malaysian tennis — independent and editorial-first.

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is an independent tennis and sports information website. We provide educational guides, tournament resources, and editorial content for Malaysian tennis fans and players.
© 2026 malaysianopentennis.com. All rights reserved. Independent site — not affiliated with the ATP, WTA, BWF, PSA, LTAM, or any tournament organiser.
